intro: Over the past two weeks, ZCyberNews has tracked 14 high-severity incidents tagged under APT, with GopherWhisper, CyberAv3ngers, and Sapphire Sleet emerging as the most frequently observed threat actors. These campaigns primarily targeted government, cryptocurrency, energy, technology, and business services sectors across Japan, Mongolia, Asia, Bangladesh, and Central America. The concentrated activity between April 13 and April 26, 2026, underscores sustained operational focus on these regions and industries.
